title: paraboea havilandii
intro: Paraboea havilandii is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly found in tropical rainforests of Asia, particularly in Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Paraboea havilandii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
